name: MDLIVE Telehealth REST API
what_it_does: MDLIVE telehealth REST API for health plans, employers, and health systems to integrate virtual care — urgent care, behavioral health, and dermatology — into member benefits and care management workflows, enabling AI agents to automate eligibility verification, appointment scheduling, member registration, and utilization reporting through MDLIVE's telehealth platform. Enables AI agents to manage member eligibility for telehealth benefit enrollment and eligibility verification automation, handle appointment scheduling for virtual care visit scheduling and provider matching automation, access registration management for patient profile creation and benefit enrollment automation, retrieve utilization reporting for telehealth visit utilization and engagement analytics automation, manage provider matching for on-demand and scheduled telehealth provider assignment automation, handle consult management for virtual visit initiation and completion tracking automation, access diagnosis and treatment for visit summary and care plan retrieval automation, retrieve referral management for post-visit specialist referral and follow-up automation, manage notification management for appointment reminder and care alert automation, and integrate MDLIVE with health plan platforms, EHRs, and benefits administration for virtual care automation.
use_cases: Integrating telehealth eligibility verification into member benefits portals for health plan automation agents
Scheduling urgent care and behavioral health virtual visits for member services automation agents
Reporting telehealth utilization to employer health plan sponsors for benefits analytics agents
Automating member onboarding to telehealth benefits at health plan enrollment for enrollment automation agents
not_for: Inpatient and emergency care coordination (MDLIVE is virtual outpatient care; emergency care requires different infrastructure)
Prescription drug management and pharmacy benefits (MDLIVE providers can prescribe; PBM platforms manage pharmacy benefits separately)
Specialty and surgical care coordination (MDLIVE is primary care, behavioral health, and dermatology; specialty care requires different referral networks)
best_when: A health plan, employer, or health system wanting AI agents to automate telehealth eligibility verification, member registration, appointment scheduling, and utilization reporting through MDLIVE's virtual care platform.
avoid_when: CIGNA/EVERNORTH OWNERSHIP SHAPES ACCESS: MDLIVE is a Cigna/Evernorth subsidiary (acquired 2021); automated independent-platform assumption creates partner_dependency for health plans outside Cigna/Evernorth network; automated should evaluate Cigna/Evernorth partnership requirements. HIPAA BAA IS REQUIRED: MDLIVE integration involves PHI; automated API-only assumption creates hipaa_violation for integrations without Business Associate Agreement; automated must execute HIPAA BAA before any integration. MEMBER ELIGIBILITY MUST BE VERIFIED: MDLIVE visits require active member eligibility; automated blanket-access assumption creates payment_denied for visit scheduling without eligibility verification; automated must verify member telehealth benefit eligibility before scheduling. STATE LICENSURE AFFECTS AVAILABILITY: MDLIVE provider availability varies by member state due to medical licensure; automated universal-availability assumption creates no_provider_available for members in states with limited telehealth provider coverage; automated must handle provider unavailability gracefully.

auth.notes: MDLIVE uses OAuth2 for Telehealth REST API. REST API with JSON. Miramar, FL HQ. Founded 2009 by Randy Parker. Acquired by Cigna/Evernorth 2021 ($2.5B estimate). Products: MDLIVE Urgent Care, MDLIVE Behavioral Health, MDLIVE Dermatology, MDLIVE for Providers. 60M+ eligible members. 24/7 provider network. Health plan and employer clients. Competes with Teladoc Health and Amwell for employer/health plan telehealth.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; health plan or employer agreement required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-visit fees or PEPM (per-employee-per-month); health plan negotiated rates
pricing.notes: Miramar FL. Cigna/Evernorth subsidiary. $2.5B acquisition. 60M+ eligible members. Health plan negotiated pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; throttling per partner agreement

known_agent_gotchas: PROVIDER MATCHING IS STATE-DEPENDENT: Telehealth provider availability is determined by member's state of residence and provider state licensure; automated national-availability assumption creates no_provider_available for members in states with limited provider coverage; automated must handle provider unavailability and offer alternatives

VISIT TYPES HAVE DIFFERENT WAIT TIMES: MDLIVE urgent care, behavioral health, and dermatology have different scheduling models (on-demand vs. scheduled); automated uniform-wait assumption creates scheduling_mismatch for expecting on-demand availability for behavioral health typically requiring scheduled appointments

MEMBER MUST COMPLETE INTAKE: New patient registration requires intake questionnaire completion before visit; automated skip-intake assumption creates visit_blocked for members who haven't completed required intake forms; automated must guide members through intake before scheduling

VISIT SUMMARIES ARE POST-VISIT: Clinical notes and diagnoses are available only after visit completion; automated pre-visit-summary assumption creates data_not_available for clinical information retrieval before visit occurs; automated must retrieve summaries only after visit completion event

SSO INTEGRATION IS COMMON FOR MEMBER ACCESS: Health plan portals typically use SSO for member authentication; automated direct-login assumption creates authentication_gap for implementations relying on separate MDLIVE credentials instead of SSO; automated should implement SSO for seamless member experience
agent_readiness.security_notes: Telehealth platform. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Patient PHI and clinical visit data — high sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Telehealth. HIPAA, SOC2. OAuth2. US. Patient PHI and clinical visit data.
